Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Judicial Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Jury Trial Date of 4/1/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. A Mediation Order to Show Cause is ordered set on 2/26/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. Matter heard by Hon. Sue Kaplan. (212)
